name: pr_cep_c_plain_cnt_other
_finding: CEP E2 item C §1a (D-139) CONTROL — corrects the D-137 finding's claim that a PLAIN accumulate 're-folds on ANY modify'. It does NOT: a plain count(tag=="y") is property-reactive on its source pattern (constraints∪bindings). Updating the UNREAD field oth does NOT re-fire (mask miss). The plain analog of the windowed rule; the only difference is that plain KEEPS constraint fields in the mask (pr_cep_c_win_sumc_tag drops them). engine==oracle: W2 once. (Plain re-fires on a tag/constraint update — that path stays byte-identical, unchanged by D-139.)
drl: rule W2 when accumulate( E0(tag == "y"); $c : count() ) then end
